name: Kolm ja pool naist karavanis
overview: Three women and a baby, or three and a half women in a caravan, embark on a crazy, heartfelt and surprising journey through Sweden, Denmark, Poland and the Baltics. The journey is not quite over yet when unexpected health problems cut the entire group down. Despite the difficulties, Eeva, Kethi and their little daughter Freya set off to take their first steps in caravan life and get used to the new rhythm. Soon Kristel joins them and the journey really takes off.
